nodes.label: Global Approval Mode
nodes.rationale: Use when a user approved in one group should be approved for all groups; default mode preserves the original approved_users.json format.

nodes.label: Group Approval Mode
nodes.rationale: Use when groups are independent and trust must be earned separately in each group.

nodes.label: Approval Check Logic
nodes.rationale: Global approval is checked before group approval so a globally approved user always receives access even when group-specific approvals exist.

nodes.label: Photo and Video Filtering
nodes.rationale: Global disablement has priority over per-chat exceptions, and both only allow photos and videos; stickers and documents remain blocked for unapproved users.

nodes.label: Sticker and Document Blocking
nodes.rationale: Stickers and documents are always blocked in the first three messages regardless of media filtering settings.
